notes: Considering the number of positive reports and the deck verified status, it's veeeery likely (if not a given) that it might be a problem on my end. That being said, the game does not go beyond the initial loading screen; it can't progress to show the main menu. It has not worked on either of my two main devices. Testing with an extra computer currently using Devuan 6 and Steam flatpak, I encountered the same issue. Using Proton-GE didn't help either. It works correctly on Windows.
title: Mewgenics
